quicksight.template.datapathcolor.CfnAbo: The color map that determines the color options for a particular element.

quicksight.template.datapathcolor.Color.Description: The color that needs to be applied to the element.

quicksight.template.datapathcolor.Elemen.Description: The element that the color needs to be applied to.

quicksight.template.datapathcolor.TimeGr.Description: The time granularity of the field that the color needs to be applied to.
quicksight.template.datapathcolor.TimeGr.Allowed values: DAY | HOUR | MILLISECOND | MINUTE | MONTH | QUARTER | SECOND | WEEK | YEAR
